track.name: As Alive As You Need Me To Be

wiki.summary: "As Alive As You Need Me to Be" is a song by American industrial rock band Nine Inch Nails. Released on 17 July 2025, it is the lead single from their score for the film Tron: Ares (2025). It's the first Nine Inch Nails release since the 2021 Health collaboration "Isn't Everyone". The song was described by Stereogum as "a fearsome rocker built on retro-futuristic ’80s electro synths", noting that "Reznor brings real ferocity to his lead vocal". Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "As Alive As You Need Me to Be" is a song by American industrial rock band Nine Inch Nails. Released on 17 July 2025, it is the lead single from their score for the film Tron: Ares (2025). It's the first Nine Inch Nails release since the 2021 Health collaboration "Isn't Everyone". The song was described by Stereogum as "a fearsome rocker built on retro-futuristic ’80s electro synths", noting that "Reznor brings real ferocity to his lead vocal". Revolver characterized the track with "huge-ass synth-bass rhythms and quake-inducing drum-machine beats [as well as] a devilishly melodic, distortion-pressed chorus", also theorizing that its "vocoded backups [are] perhaps a nod to previous Tron scorers Daft Punk". A few days before the song's release, the song's title was teased on a t-shirt sold at European dates on the band's Peel It Back world tour. The release was accompanied by a lyric video uploaded to Nine Inch Nails' official YouTube channel, as well as an official announcement of the release date and tracklist for the Tron: Ares score. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
